controller_model: Autopilot CO2 Monitor & Controller with 15' Remote Sensor (APC8200)

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot CO2 Monitor & Controller with 15' Remote Sensor (APC8200)
compatible_devices.notes: APC8200 controls connected CO2 device via 120V switched outlet. Wide-range power input (100–240V AC). 2-channel NDIR sensor with ±50 ppm accuracy. CO2 trend logging up to 7 days. Day/Night auto-disable via built-in photocell. Fully compatible with Autopilot gas generators.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot CO2 Monitor & Controller with 15' Remote Sensor (APC8200)
compatible_devices.notes: Titan Controls Ares gas generators and CO2 solenoid regulator both compatible via standard 120V NEMA 5-15 outlet. APC8200 provides more advanced monitoring (NDIR dual-channel sensor, 7-day trend chart) than the simpler Autopilot CO2 controllers.

compatible_devices.controller_model: Autopilot CO2 Monitor & Controller with 15' Remote Sensor (APC8200)
compatible_devices.notes: Any 120V CO2 device (gas generator or compressed CO2 solenoid regulator) is compatible. CO2 measurement range 0–5000 ppm, accuracy ±50 ppm or ±5% whichever is greater. Wide input voltage 100–240V AC makes unit suitable for both US and international markets. No app, no proprietary protocol.
